creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Anonymous <swell.k@gmail.com> writes:

[...]
> Move WITH_DEBUG ifdef so it defines STRIP more early, e.g. in _PREMKINCLUDED.

INOPTIONSMK may be a better place. It'd allow ports that only include
bsd.port.options.mk to not explicitly include bsd.port.pre.mk,
e.g. ports/153541.
